description: Style NoteThe carefree summer reminds us of boho chic (currently trending on all street fashion circuits) and we present to you this not-so-very over the top cap from roxy. With earthy rope style detail woven with more colourful threads around the crown, this detail transforms the look of the cap to boho lover's dream. Product DetailsBlack cap with woven rope and colourful thread detailing around the crownStitches at the seams of the crownShort and curved visorElastication at the back for a customised FitMaterial and Care100% cottonWipe with a clean cloth to remove dust
